title: Decision: --media CLI uses process_local with correct size/validation path
description: The Post command in src/cli.rs iterates --media paths, calls process_local() for each, and errors if any fail (? propagation). The file size check (metadata.len() > MAX_FILE_SIZE) is correct for local files because metadata.len() reflects the actual file size without reading the file first. No issues found in the CLI media attachment path.
close_reason: All pass 4 fixes applied: media SSRF+size guard, mime/format consistency, proper keyId parsing, fail-closed sig verify, path reconstruction, key owner validation, media cap, blocking stdin fix, conflicts_with
